description: Functions / FaaS service contract v1 — 14 operations for edge-compute and FaaS platforms (Cloudflare Workers, AWS Lambda, Vercel Functions, Deno Deploy). v1 covers code deployment, secrets, schedules, versions, logs, and test invocation. Bindings (KV, R2, D1, queues) are out of scope and deferred to a future bindings-v1.

operations.description: List deployed scripts/functions in the account
operations.name: script_list

operations.description: Get details for a single script (entry point, runtime, last deployed)
operations.name: script_get

operations.description: Deploy a new version of a script (upload bundled code)
operations.name: script_deploy

operations.description: List cron triggers / schedules attached to a script
operations.name: schedule_list

operations.description: List secret names bound to a script (values not returned)
operations.name: secret_list

operations.description: Replace cron triggers / schedules on a script
operations.name: schedule_set

operations.description: List historical versions of a script
operations.name: version_list

operations.description: Open a live log tail stream for a script
operations.name: tail

operations.description: Fetch a recent buffered log slice for a script
operations.name: recent_logs

operations.description: Create or update a script secret
operations.name: secret_put

operations.description: Delete a script secret (destructive, requires confirmation)
operations.name: secret_delete

operations.description: Roll a script back to a previous version (destructive, requires confirmation)
operations.name: version_rollback

operations.description: Test-invoke a script with a request payload (test only — production traffic uses native triggers)
operations.name: invoke

title: functions-v1
